CVE-2012-2150.title: xfs_metadump in xfsprogs before 3.2.4 does not properly obfuscate ...
CVE-2012-2150.description: xfs_metadump in xfsprogs before 3.2.4 does not properly obfuscate file data, which allows remote attackers to obtain sensitive information by reading a generated image.
